diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -17,26 +17,20 @@
     norm_stats = ckpt['norm_stats']

     

     model_type = ckpt.get('model_type', 'unet')

+    base_dim = ckpt.get('base_dim', 128)

     

-    if model_type == 'unet_v2':

+    if model_type in ('v2', 'unet_v2'):

         from model_v2 import WeatherUNetV2

-        base_dim = ckpt.get('base_dim', 128)

-        dropout = ckpt.get('dropout', 0.0)

-        residual = ckpt.get('residual', True)

-        num_levels = ckpt.get('num_levels', 3)

-        model = WeatherUNetV2(in_channels=6, out_channels=2, base_dim=base_dim,

-                            dropout=0.0, residual=residual, num_levels=num_levels)

-        model.load_state_dict(ckpt['model_state_dict'])

+        model = WeatherUNetV2(in_channels=6, out_channels=2, base_dim=base_dim, dropout=0.0)

     else:

         from model import WeatherUNet

-        base_dim = ckpt.get('base_dim', 128)

         dropout = ckpt.get('dropout', 0.0)

         residual = ckpt.get('residual', True)

         num_levels = ckpt.get('num_levels', 3)

         model = WeatherUNet(in_channels=6, out_channels=2, base_dim=base_dim,

                             dropout=0.0, residual=residual, num_levels=num_levels)

-        model.load_state_dict(ckpt['model_state_dict'])

     

+    model.load_state_dict(ckpt['model_state_dict'])

     model = model.to(device)

     model.eval()
